Package fr.maif

Class IzanamiClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • fr.maif.IzanamiClient
  • public class IzanamiClient
extends Object
    Client to query Izanami for feature activation status. This should be instantiated only once by application.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructor Description

    • Constructor Detail

      • IzanamiClient

        @Deprecated
public IzanamiClient​(IzanamiConnectionInformation connectionInformation,
                     Optional<FeatureClientErrorStrategy> errorStrategy,
                     Optional<FeatureCacheConfiguration> cacheConfiguration,
                     Optional<IzanamiHttpClient> httpClient,
                     Optional<Duration> duration,
                     Set<String> idsToPreload)
        Deprecated.

      • IzanamiClient

        public IzanamiClient​(IzanamiConnectionInformation connectionInformation,
                     Optional<FeatureClientErrorStrategy> errorStrategy,
                     Optional<FeatureCacheConfiguration> cacheConfiguration,
                     Optional<IzanamiHttpClient> httpClient,
                     Optional<Duration> callTimeout,
                     Set<String> idsToPreload,
                     Optional<BooleanCastStrategy> castStrategy)
        Constructor
        Parameters:
        connectionInformation - information about remote Izanami instance
        errorStrategy - default error strategy to use in case client fails to fetch remote Izanami. This can be overrided at request level.
        cacheConfiguration - cache configuration to use
        httpClient - httpClient to use
        callTimeout - timeout for remote instance http calls
        idsToPreload - flag ids to preload, preloading id prevent from payin the cost of querying remote Izanami first time flags are needed
        castStrategy - default strategy to use to cast non-boolean values in boolean when needed. Possible values are STRICT (trying to cast non boolean value to boolean value will fail) and LAX (empty string, numeric 0 and null are false, everything else is true).

    • Method Detail

      • close

        public CompletableFuture<Void> close()
        Close underlying SSE client if SSE client is used, otherwise do nothing.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that complete when SSE client is closed, or immediately if there is no SSE client

      • newBuilder

        public static IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder newBuilder​(IzanamiConnectionInformation connectionInformation)
        Create a new izanami client builder
        Parameters:
        connectionInformation - must contain connection information for your Izanami instance
        Returns:
        an initialized new izanami client builder

      • checkFeatureActivations

        @Deprecated
public CompletableFuture<Map<String,​Boolean>> checkFeatureActivations​(FeatureRequest request)
        Deprecated.
        use checkFeatureValues instead
        Retrieve activation status for features in given request.
        Parameters:
        request - request containing feature ids to query and optionally more information about query, cache use or error strategy.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing a Map that associates each feature to its activation status

      • checkFeatureActivation

        @Deprecated
public CompletableFuture<Boolean> checkFeatureActivation​(SingleFeatureRequest request)
        Deprecated.
        use checkBooleanFeatureValue instead
        Retrieve activation status for a single feature
        Parameters:
        request - containing feature id to query and optionally more information about query, cache use or error strategy.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing activation status for requested feature

      • stringValue

        public CompletableFuture<String> stringValue​(SingleFeatureRequest request)
        Retrieve string value of the flag given request
        Parameters:
        request - request to match
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will resolve with requested feature value. If feature does not have a string value error strategy will be used to determine value to return.

      • numberValue

        public CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> numberValue​(SingleFeatureRequest request)
        Retrieve number value of the flag given request
        Parameters:
        request - request to match
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will resolve with requested feature value. If feature does not have a number value error strategy will be used to determine value to return.

      • booleanValue

        public CompletableFuture<Boolean> booleanValue​(SingleFeatureRequest request)
        Retrieve boolean value of the flag given request
        Parameters:
        request - request to match
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will resolve with requested feature value. If feature does not have a boolean value:
        • if a LAX BooleanCastStrategy was specified, value will be casted to boolean (empty string, numeric 0 and null are false, everything else is true).
        • if STRICT BooleanCastStrategy was specified (or if no strategy was specified) error strategy will be used to determine value to return.

      • featureValues

        public CompletableFuture<IzanamiResult> featureValues​(FeatureRequest request)
        Return multiple feature values.
        Parameters:
        request - feature request
        Returns:
        a completable future containing feature values

      • isLoaded

        public CompletableFuture<Void> isLoaded()
        Indicate when client is loaded. A loaded client has fetch ids to preload (if provided). If no ids were provided, client is ready immediately after its instantiation.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolve when client has loaded id to preload (if any).
